author: Ameen Hassan
summary: User asked how to score RFP eligibility. Assistant recommended a two-tier approach: hard gates (pass/fail) first to check mandatory criteria like 245G licensure, geographic service area, org type, and prior grant restrictions, followed by weighted scoring for eligible applicants. Session ended immediately after with /exit.
problems: How to structure RFP eligibility scoring
approaches: Two-tier approach: hard gates (pass/fail) followed by weighted scoring
Hard gates check mandatory criteria: licensure status (245G), geographic service area, org type, prior grant restrictions
results: Recommended framework: eliminate ineligible applicants via hard gates before applying weighted scoring
open_questions: What weighted scoring criteria and weights should follow the hard gate pass/fail check?
Which specific RFP is this scoring framework being designed for?
